LanguageData.CameraPlus3: Welcome to the new version of Camera+! Explore enhanced custom silhouette options in the settings menu to improve your experience.
LanguageData.HideNamesWhenZoomedOut: Hide name labels when zoomed out
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_All: Use All for the familiar full list, or pick a topic to narrow the settings.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Zoom: Visual zoom range and how quickly zoom changes across it.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Movement: Normal camera movement speed and screen-edge scrolling are separate.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Audio: Adjusts listener height for world sounds. It does not change visual zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Camera: Direct camera behavior that is not tied to labels or markers.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Labels: Controls when pawn, stack, and dead-pawn labels are hidden or revealed.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Markers: Global marker style for pawns not matched by rules.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Animals: Global animal marker policy. Untamed animals are gated before default rules.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Edges: Off-screen markers are independent from in-map pawn replacement.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Appearance: Marker scale, edge spacing, and outline thickness.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Advanced: Shortcuts and rules are separate dialogs.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomRange: Sets the visual closest and furthest Camera+ zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomCurve: Changes how zoom accelerates between the range limits.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_MovementSpeed: Controls ordinary camera movement at each zoom end.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_EdgeScroll: Controls screen-edge scrolling separately from normal movement.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_CameraBehavior: Camera toggles that apply immediately while playing.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_AudioListener: Controls how close world sounds feel without changing visual zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_LabelVisibility: Label thresholds only apply when Camera+ controls marker rendering.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_MarkerStyle: Default marker replacement for pawns not styled by rules.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_AnimalPolicy: Controls which animals are eligible and which marker family they use.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_EdgeIndicators: Controls off-screen markers and animal color fallback.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_MarkerAppearance: Visual scale and spacing after marker selection.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_AdvancedActions: Open shortcuts or the rule editor without changing basic settings.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedInPercent: How far Camera+ can zoom in visually.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedOutPercent: How far Camera+ can zoom out visually.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_Exponentiality: Higher values make zoom speed change more strongly across the range.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedInDollyPercent: Camera movement speed near the closest zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedOutDollyPercent: Camera movement speed near the furthest zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedInEdgeScroll: Screen-edge scroll speed near the closest zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomedOutEdgeScroll: Screen-edge scroll speed near the furthest zoom.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ZoomToMouse: Keeps the map point under the cursor stable while zooming.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_SoundNearness: Moves the audio listener toward vanilla close height for local sounds.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_MouseRevealsLabels: Shows labels near the mouse while Camera+ would otherwise hide them.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_HidePawnLabelBelow: Hides pawn labels once cells are smaller than this size.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_HideThingLabelBelow: Hides stack labels once cells are smaller than this size.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_HideDeadPawnsBelow: Hides dead pawn rendering below this cell size.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_DotStyle: Default marker mode. Rules can override it for matching pawns.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_ShowMarkerBelow: Cell size threshold where Camera+ replaces pawn bodies with markers.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_AnimalMarkerStyle: Animal marker family and inclusion behavior.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_IncludeNotTamedAnimals: Includes unnamed wild animals before default animal rules are checked.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_AnimalEdgeColors: When animal rule fill is transparent, edge indicators use the animal body color.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_EdgeDistanceFactor: Moves edge markers nearer to or farther from the screen border.
LanguageData.SettingsHelp_OutlineSize: Changes marker outline width and rebuilds marker materials.
